metadata.description: Mailchimp authoring skills for Claude Code — custom-coded MCTL templates, responsive email patterns, accessibility, pre-upload validation.

plugins.name: mailchimp-claude-skills
plugins.description: Brand-neutral toolkit for authoring custom-coded responsive Mailchimp email templates. Provides MCTL placement rules, responsive table patterns, Outlook hardening, accessibility, compliance tags, and a pre-upload validator — so prompts can focus on brand, design, and structure.
